description: Persist a JSON config file via the file_write tool (or shell `cat >`) and confirm the write (covers the non-CLI toolchain)

turns.user: Please write this config to /tmp/eval-config.json: {"scene":"eval","version":1,"tags":["a","b"]}. Tell me the file size after writing.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent invokes the `file_write` tool, or shell `cat > /tmp/eval-config.json`, to persist the specified content
expectations.overall: Agent must actually write the file via a tool (not just describe the steps) and report the result
